title: Preparation of ASW+NO3 Medium
author: Roscoff Culture Collection
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.s5zeg76

steps.title: Dissolve 25 g of NaCl in...
steps.instruction: Dissolve 25 g of NaCl in MilliQ water To this solution, add : %s %s Adjust the pH to 8 with concentrated HCl Adjust to 999 mL with milliQ water Add 1 mL of trace metals (see receipe below) Autoclave the medium

steps.title: Dissolve all these components separately in milliQ water
steps.instruction: Dissolve all these components separately in milliQ water : %s %s Combine the various solutions after full dissolution Make final volume up to 1L with milliQ Store in refrigerator
